name: Glazed Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 16 Chicken wings, split, with tips removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat cranberry sauce and water over low heat, stirring occasionally until blended.
2. Stir in mustard and orange peel. Remove from heat; cool slightly.
3. In a medium bowl, mix chicken with mustard mixture; cover and chill overnight.
4. Preheat oven to 400°F.
5. Remove chicken from marinade; reserve marinade.
6. Arrange chicken on lightly greased foil-lined pan.
7. Bake for 40-45 minutes, turning and brushing chicken with marinade after 20 minutes.
